description: Migration: agent_idp_providers gains kind ('google'|'microsoft'|'custom', default 'custom') + entra_tenant_id (nullable); existing rows = custom
OIDC discovery helper: fetch .well-known/openid-configuration -> { issuer, jwks_uri }, cached, reusing jose/fetch
Provider presets module: google (fixed issuer accounts.google.com + well-known JWKS, default subject_claim 'sub'); microsoft (issuer from entra tenant id, discover JWKS, default subject_claim 'azp')
addTrustedIdp accepts { kind, entraTenantId } and resolves issuer/jwks_uri/subject_claim via preset + discovery; custom still accepts raw issuer/jwks/audience/claim
/api/v1/mcp/idp-providers route + @product/mcp seam pass kind + entraTenantId through to addTrustedIdp
Admin UI: provider dropdown (Microsoft Entra / Google / Custom) with conditional fields (Microsoft: tenant id; Google: none; Custom: raw)
Admin UI shows the resolved issuer + JWKS read-only after a preset is chosen (transparency)
Service: detect tenant's existing Microsoft/Entra connection (microsoft_profiles / entra_managed_tenants / known tid) -> suggested entra tenant id
Admin UI: 'You're already connected to Microsoft — enable agent access?' one-click prefill of the Microsoft preset
Hosted detection helper (SaaS): shared app secrets present + hosted flag
Built-in trusted issuers for Google + Microsoft (shared-app audience), available on hosted without per-tenant agent_idp_providers rows
idpToken validation consults built-in hosted issuers in addition to agent_idp_providers
PRM (/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource) advertises the built-in authorization_servers on hosted
Hosted: bind an agent to a built-in issuer + subject without manual IdP registration (interactive/human-delegated path)
Per-provider subject-claim guidance in the UI (Microsoft app token azp/appid vs user oid/sub; Google service account sub), preset-defaulted + editable
Friendly error on duplicate (issuer, subject) binding (one agent per identity)
Guided wizard: copy-paste steps/values to create the agent's directory identity (Entra app registration / Google service account) for unattended agents
Docs update (docs/mcp-server.md): the easy path (presets, reuse, hosted) + the irreducible unattended-machine-agent caveat
